arxiv.notes: Official arXiv API with configurable sort and field targeting.

pubmed.notes: Official NCBI metadata search with relevance sorting by default.

biorxiv.notes: Official bioRxiv API; supports category retrieval and DOI lookup rather than free-text search.

semantic.notes: Semantic Scholar search plus citation graph traversal.

openalex.notes: OpenAlex catalog, citations, references, related papers, and DOI lookups.

pmc.notes: PubMed Central full-text search and download.

core.notes: CORE open-access search. API key optional for higher limits.

europe_pmc.notes: Europe PMC search, citations, related articles, and full text where available.

hal.notes: HAL open archive search and downloads.

zenodo.notes: Zenodo record search, files, downloads, and metadata inspection.

experimental.google_scholar: Excluded from the default surface because the adapter is scraping-based and timeout-prone.
experimental.sci_hub: Excluded from the default surface because it is legally risky.
experimental.ssrn: Imported for later evaluation only; excluded because it depends on unsupported scraping rather than an official API.
